pim_attribute_model.note: Stable product master identifier.
Required for import, ERP and stock joins.
Required for marketplaces, feeds and retail consistency.
Main VITAR, Sport, Veterina, Pharma/MaxFarma, OEM/B2B, exclude.
Hero, top-tier, mass-market, legacy, separate BU.
Customer navigation category, not necessarily internal taxonomy.
Immunity, sleep, magnesium, beauty, urinary, joints, children.
Must support ingredient search and comparison.
Tablets, capsules, effervescent, syrup, powder, drink, cosmetic.
Needed for product page, structured data and customer trust.
Units, grams, ml, number of tablets/capsules.
Important for drinks, effervescent tablets and kids products.
Children, women, men, seniors, sport, pets.
Expose only where approved and useful.
Prevent overclaiming before content migration.
Contraindications, dosage warnings, pregnancy/kids warnings.
Supports premium positioning and VITAR GROUP trust story.
Current VITAR.cz often lacks commerce price.
Required for feeds and UX.
Bundles, alternatives, complementary products.
Old to new product/category/content URL decisions.
Product, Offer, Brand, BreadcrumbList, FAQ where applicable.
